prompt: Compliance flagged us: the support-ticket exports are occasionally missing the last few tickets of a batch, and it's always the big attachment-heavy ones. The export driver definitely submits them — I added logging — and if I rerun the export the 'missing' tickets show up scrubbed in memory AFTER the archive was already written. So drain() is apparently perfectly happy to return before the pipeline is actually done, but only when a slow record is involved; small batches of cheap tickets look fine. Module is scrub.py, failing repro is python3 test_scrub.py. Please fix the pipeline (not the tests) and paste the passing test output.
